name: PhantomOperator
description: Automated privacy-removal agent: scans the web for personal data leaks, classifies threats, and submits opt-out requests to data brokers. Payments via Superfluid streaming on Base.

skills.name: Threat Scan
skills.description: Searches the public web for mentions of a person's name that contain PII (phone numbers, email addresses, SSNs, home address). Returns a threat report with severity levels.

inputs.name: fullName
inputs.description: Full name of the person to scan for

outputs.name: threats
outputs.description: Array of detected threats with title, link, description, threatLevel (benign/high/critical), and reasons

skills.name: Data Removal Request
skills.description: Submits opt-out / removal requests to known data broker endpoints on behalf of the user.

inputs.name: threatUrl
inputs.description: URL of the page containing the PII to remove

inputs.name: fullName
inputs.description: Full name of the person requesting removal

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Object with broker name and status (success/failed)

skills.name: OPSEC Exposure Score
skills.description: Multi-vector operational security exposure assessment. Aggregates public web search, data broker indexing, paste/leak sites, and social media footprint into a scored report (0–100) with grade A–F and prioritised remediation steps. Ideal for red teamers, PERSEC auditors, and privacy-first individuals.

inputs.name: fullName
inputs.description: Full legal name of the target (optional if handle or email provided)

inputs.name: email
inputs.description: Email address to include in the assessment (optional)

outputs.name: breakdown
outputs.description: Per-category sub-scores: searchExposure, dataBrokerExposure, pasteLeaks, socialFootprint

outputs.name: topThreats
outputs.description: Top threat passages from the retrieved corpus with source URL and threat level

skills.name: Breach & Credential Check
skills.description: Privacy-preserving breach and credential exposure check. Email breach lookup via HaveIBeenPwned (requires HIBP_API_KEY). Password check uses the HIBP k-anonymity range API — only a 5-char SHA-1 prefix is transmitted; the full credential never leaves the caller. Returns breach count, affected data classes, risk level, and remediation advice.

inputs.name: email
inputs.description: Email address to check against known breach databases (optional)

inputs.name: password
inputs.description: Plaintext password to check via k-anonymity (optional — hash prefix only transmitted)

outputs.name: emailReport
outputs.description: Breach report: breachCount, breaches[], riskLevel, criticalDataClasses, recommendation

outputs.name: passwordCheck
outputs.description: k-anonymity result: { pwned: boolean, count: number }

skills.name: Metadata Privacy Audit
skills.description: Fetch any HTTP/HTTPS URL and extract all metadata that could de-anonymise its author or expose infrastructure details: HTTP response headers (Server, X-Powered-By, X-Generator), HTML <meta> tags (author, geo.*, email), inline HTML comments (version strings, file paths), and third-party resource origins. Each finding is classified critical / high / medium / low with a remediation recommendation.

outputs.name: overallRisk
outputs.description: Highest risk level found: critical / high / medium / low / none

outputs.name: findingCounts
outputs.description: Count of findings per risk level

outputs.name: findings
outputs.description: Array of findings with category, riskLevel, label, field, value

skills.name: Full Privacy Sweep
skills.description: Runs a full threat scan followed by automated removal requests for all high/critical findings, with real-time Superfluid micropayment streaming for the duration of the task.

inputs.name: walletAddress
inputs.description: Wallet address to stream payment from

outputs.name: flowTxHash
outputs.description: Transaction hash of the Superfluid flow start

pricing.note: Priced by streaming flow rate (set FLOW_RATE in env)
